app.title: ALIEN MONITOR
app.connectFailedAuth: Monitor API is locked — set ALIEN_PUBLIC_READ=1 on the server or rebuild with VITE_ALIEN_API_TOKEN.
app.connectFailedNetwork: Cannot reach the monitor backend — check /monitor/api/health and nginx WebSocket proxy.

monitor.prometheusDegraded: Prometheus unavailable — optional on-chain metrics layer degraded (start :9090 or ignore)

controls.reputationHint: Open the reputation graph (LUMEN EigenTrust/PageRank over the live ecosystem)

dioscuri.collaborationNote: Not a third twin — separate persona in the same DIOSCURI process.
dioscuri.castorBlurb: CASTOR rides Telegram — fast community Q&A and release fan-out.
dioscuri.polluxBlurb: POLLUX holds Discord — moderation, #help, and ecosystem announcements.
dioscuri.theorosBlurb: THEOROS · θ — high-tech theorist. Weekly Agent Sovereignty Canon in #the-canon; twins announce, he drafts.

desc.dioscuri: Twin community agents — CASTOR on Telegram, POLLUX on Discord. THEOROS collaborates on the weekly canon column — separate persona, same process. Shared MNEMOSYNE; AEGIS shield.
desc.helios: Broadcast pipeline — template in, voiced video out, queued to YouTube. Private until operator approve. POST-only, no engagement bots.
desc.metis: Distributed cognitive layer over any LLM — Understanding Council, confidence gate, layered MoA, and a verifier. Returns a verify score and asks for clarification instead of guessing. A loosely-coupled peer: the factory runs without it, and it runs standalone.
desc.skopos: Fleet observability satellite — nginx & Apache analytics over SSH, Security Center with 3D threat map, scan history, and an AI analyst. Self-hosted data; PostgreSQL recommended for production.

ai.title: AI ASSISTANT
ai.welcome: I'm your 3D map navigator — I know SKOPOS, Metis, DIOSCURI, Helios, Argus, Hub, Factory, oracles, and the full alexar76 ecosystem. Ask where to fly, what a node does, or say «show SKOPOS» to open it on the map.
ai.offline: Unable to reach the AI. The backend may be offline.
ai.timeout: AI is still thinking — try again in a moment.

suggestions.now: What's happening in the monitor right now?
suggestions.skopos: Show me SKOPOS on the map
suggestions.factory: Where are factory products on the map?
suggestions.navigate: Where should I zoom to see the catalog?

voice.unavailable: Voice input isn't available in this browser. Try Chrome, Edge, or Samsung Internet.
voice.micRecognitionDenied: Microphone access is required. Allow the mic in site settings and reload.
voice.micNeedsHttps: Microphone only works on HTTPS or localhost.
voice.micNoMediaDevices: This browser doesn't support microphone access. Try Chrome or Edge.
voice.micPermBlocked: Microphone is blocked for this site. Allow it in settings and reload.
voice.micDeviceBusy: Microphone unavailable or busy in another app.

reputation.title: REPUTATION
reputation.liveHint: Real reputation: PageRank over the live ecosystem trust graph
reputation.sourceLive: EigenTrust / PageRank over live ecosystem links
reputation.sourceLiveTrust: Live federation trust on {{n}} node(s) · EigenTrust / PageRank
reputation.empty: No graph data for this mode yet

chat.title: Chat with Metis
chat.hint: Metis looks offline. Start it with `metis-serve` (or set METIS_URL) to chat here.
chat.welcome: Ask Metis anything — it deliberates, verifies, and answers.
chat.offline: Metis is not reachable right now.
chat.timeout: Metis took too long to respond.
